ham.subject: AWS Invoice Summary – March 2024
ham.body:
Dear DevOps Team,

Your Amazon Web Services bill for the period 01‑03‑2024 to 31‑03‑2024 has been generated. Below is a summary of your charges:

• EC2 instances – 120 hrs – $1,200
• S3 storage – 2 TB – $240
• Data transfer – outbound 500 GB – $115

Total Due: $1,555.00

Please review the detailed invoice and make the payment by 15‑04‑2024. Payments can be processed through the Billing Dashboard.

View Invoice: <URL>

Thank you for your continued use of AWS.

Best regards,
AWS Billing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your AWS Account Has Been Compromised – Secure It Now
spam.body:
Hello Valued Customer,

We have detected suspicious activity on your AWS account that could compromise your data and incur unexpected charges. As a security precaution, your account has been temporarily locked.

To verify your identity and restore full access, you must complete a quick verification step within 24 hours. Failure to do so will result in permanent suspension of your AWS services.

Click the link below to initiate the verification process:
<URL>

Security Team, AWS
